# Shot 30 finalCTA - Single-Shot Certification Asset

## Source timing

- Shot ID: shot_30
- Scene type: finalCTA
- Reference clip: C:\Users\Administrator\.codex\references\extracted-shots\shot_30_finalCTA_26.6-30.0.mp4
- Actual start time in source video: 26.640s
- Actual end time in source video: 30.000s
- Duration: 3.360s
- Certification status: candidate only; approved=false; allowedInFactory=false

## Visual hierarchy

1. Background layer: clean final stage with soft radial depth, not source brand colors.
2. CTA card group: 2-3 cards converge toward center, forming a final decision area.
3. Main CTA button: central conversion action; must stay readable and safe.
4. Supporting proof chips: small trust/value chips around the CTA.
5. Final settle: short hold for end-card readability.

## Timing

- 0%-100% / ctaBackdropGlow: soft final-card depth drift.
- 6%-36% / ctaCardsConverge: cards enter from left/right/bottom and converge.
- 28%-56% / finalTitleReveal: final headline reveals upward.
- 48%-72% / primaryButtonPop: CTA button pops once, no repeated bounce.
- 62%-84% / proofChipsOrbitIn: proof chips arc into stable positions.
- 84%-100% / finalCtaSettle: final readability hold.

## Reusable atomic motions

- ctaBackdropGlow
- ctaCardsConverge
- finalTitleReveal
- primaryButtonPop
- proofChipsOrbitIn
- finalCtaSettle

## Exclude from library

- Source brand, exact copy, logos, source icons, and decorative elements with no CTA semantics.
- Repeated shaking, flashing, or confetti effects.

## Choreography timeline

| Track | Motion | Target | Percent | Role |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | ctaBackdropGlow | ctaBackdrop | 0-100 | depth-establish |
| 2 | ctaCardsConverge | ctaCards | 6-36 | final-card-build |
| 3 | finalTitleReveal | finalTitle | 28-56 | message-hierarchy |
| 4 | primaryButtonPop | primaryButton | 48-72 | conversion-emphasis |
| 5 | proofChipsOrbitIn | proofChips | 62-84 | supporting-proof |
| 6 | finalCtaSettle | fullComposition | 84-100 | readability-hold |

## QA notes

- Safe area: planned pass.
- Typography: planned pass.
- Semantic shape: planned pass.
- Current approval: false.
- Current factory access: false.
